topic: Parent-hub routing, radical lateral rethinks (out-of-box GLM lineage)

resolvedQuestions.text: If Layer-1 routing were deleted entirely, what breaks vs improves?
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Abolition is a tier-split (cold advisor + hot advisor-loaded vocab), not a deletion.

resolvedQuestions.text: Which routing primitive transfers from a non-routing domain, and at what cost?
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Closed-loop feedback channel (smaller than health-check); four-of-five analogies collapse to weighted selection.

resolvedQuestions.text: Does no-wrong-door/handoff dissolve the keep-vs-null distinction? At what cost?
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Orthogonally yes; keep-vs-null becomes a cost inequality (one handoff vs one clarification turn), not a moral judgment.

resolvedQuestions.text: Does confidence-first + learned routing make defaultMode meaningless?
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Yes with handoff; the (T,R,P) decomposition subsumes defaultMode as one corner.

resolvedQuestions.text: Is the INTENT_SIGNALS+RESOURCE_MAP scheme load-bearing or an accident?
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Field-level conflation of three orthogonal concerns; minimal router = (T,R,P) + vocabulary table.

keyFindings.label: Typed handoff needs routeId/fromMode/toMode/reason/evidence; current router has no handoff vocabulary
Genuine transfer is the feedback channel (closed-loop routing), smaller than health-check analogy
Learn the vocabulary-to-mode assignment, not the weights (weights uniformly 4 = vestigial)
Routing has three orthogonal knobs: Threshold (T), Recovery (R), Provenance (P); defaultMode is one corner
Smell named: routerPolicy fields conflate T/R/P across all 7 hubs
defaultMode was never a design knob — it was a documented bug compensating for missing recovery primitive
Minimal router = (T,R,P) triple + vocabulary table; 6 routerPolicy fields deleted/relocated
_apply_deep_skill_routing_layer is the one shipped precedent for advisor-side mode pre-resolution
Cross-iteration convergence: handoff is the typed substrate turning re-prompt into first-class closed-loop channel

ruledOutDirections.direction: Set every defaultMode to null as abolition
OS scheduler priority/preemption as routing primitive
IP longest-prefix match as routing primitive
Full health-score routing as immediate destination

promotedIdeas.idea: Closed-loop routing with typed handoff as the substrate
